 {"id":"bd-2zj3","title":"E2E Tests: demo_showcase navigation flows","description":"End-to-end tests for demo_showcase navigation and page flows.

## Purpose
Test complete user workflows through demo_showcase,
verifying the app works as a real user would experience it.

## Test Requirements

### Application Startup
- [ ] App starts and renders initial dashboard
- [ ] Sidebar shows all pages
- [ ] Status bar displays correctly
- [ ] Help overlay accessible via '?'

### Page Navigation
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts 1-8 navigate pages
- [ ] Sidebar selection works
- [ ] Page state persists during navigation
- [ ] Back navigation if implemented

### Each Page Smoke Test
- [ ] Dashboard - metrics load and display
- [ ] Services - service list renders
- [ ] Jobs - job list with progress
- [ ] Logs - log entries display, filter works
- [ ] Docs - documentation tree navigable
- [ ] Files - file browser works
- [ ] Wizard - can start wizard flow
- [ ] Settings - settings toggle correctly

## Logging Requirements
- [ ] Log every key press with timestamp
- [ ] Log expected vs actual page after nav
- [ ] Capture terminal state on failure
- [ ] Include timing information

## Success Criteria
- All navigation paths tested
- Each page renders without error
- No dead-end states","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldPeak","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:54:27.855435034Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:47:24.353840429Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:47:24.353771681Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","e2e","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2zj3","depends_on_id":"bd-1cgb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2zj3","depends_on_id":"bd-28kk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2zj3","depends_on_id":"bd-t1aq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2zkx","title":"Integration Tests: Cross-platform terminal support","description":"Integration tests for cross-platform terminal compatibility.

## Purpose
Ensure charmed_rust works correctly across different
terminals and platforms.

## Test Requirements

### Terminal Capability Detection
- [ ] Color support detection (16/256/RGB)
- [ ] Unicode support detection
- [ ] Mouse support detection
- [ ] Alternate screen support

### Graceful Degradation
- [ ] ASCII-only fallback mode
- [ ] 16-color fallback
- [ ] No-mouse fallback
- [ ] Dumb terminal handling

### Platform-Specific
- [ ] Linux terminal emulators
- [ ] macOS Terminal.app
- [ ] Windows Terminal
- [ ] Windows ConHost (legacy)
- [ ] SSH sessions
- [ ] tmux/screen

### Environment Variables
- [ ] TERM handling
- [ ] COLORTERM handling
- [ ] NO_COLOR support
- [ ] FORCE_COLOR support
- [ ] CI detection

## Test Approach
Use environment variable mocking to simulate
different terminal environments.

## Success Criteria
- Works in all major terminals
- Degrades gracefully when features unavailable
- Respects user terminal preferences","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldPeak","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:54:14.596526172Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:23:57.615013775Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:23:57.614885346Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cross-platform","integration","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2zkx","depends_on_id":"bd-3nyf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-30md","title":"Animations: page transitions + focus highlight","description":"Add high-impact motion polish: page transitions + focus highlight.

Why:
- Smooth transitions are a huge part of the "turned up to 11" feel.
- This also demonstrates harmonica-based animation integrated into bubbletea’s update loop.

What to animate:
- Page transition:
  - subtle slide/fade or wipe between pages (Dashboard → Jobs → Docs, etc.)
  - transition should be fast and never feel sluggish
- Focus highlight:
  - clearly indicate which pane is focused (sidebar vs main vs modal)
  - when focus changes, animate the highlight rather than snapping (unless reduce-motion)

Constraints:
- Must respect `--no-animations` / reduce-motion:
  - animations become instant state changes
- Must never cause layout corruption:
  - transitions should not change measured widths/heights mid-frame

Testability:
- Animation invariants are covered by the animation unit tests.
- Key UI snapshots should include at least one focused vs unfocused view.

Acceptance:
- Transitions feel premium and consistent.
- Reduce-motion mode still looks good (no broken visuals).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:12:56.791266325Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T03:25:01.311399057Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T03:25:01.311332223Z","close_reason":"Implemented page transition animation infrastructure: 1) Added page_transition animation trigger in navigate() function, 2) Sidebar focus animation already implemented with focus_intensity parameter and border visual effect, 3) Added tests for page transition animation and reduce-motion compliance, 4) Animation coordinator (Animator) fully integrated with spring physics. All changes respect --no-animations flag.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["anim","demo_showcase","polish"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-30md","depends_on_id":"bd-2fnc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-30md","depends_on_id":"bd-2k35","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-30md","depends_on_id":"bd-3q7p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
+{"id":"bd-31dy","title":"glow conformance: real Go capture + strict output comparison","description":"Problem:
- `tests/conformance/go_reference/cmd/glow/main.go` writes reader fixtures with `output: "[needs Go capture]"` and `needs_runtime: true`.
- `tests/conformance/crates/glow/mod.rs` does not compare output to fixture output; it only checks non-empty output, so it can pass even when rendering is wrong.

Goal:
- Make glow conformance a real check against Go outputs (no placeholders; strict assertions).

Scope:
1) Update Go capture (`tests/conformance/go_reference/cmd/glow/main.go`) to actually render markdown using Go glamour and store the rendered output string in `expected_output.output` (remove `needs_runtime`).
2) Refresh `tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/glow.json` using the capture toolchain.
3) Update Rust conformance (`tests/conformance/crates/glow/mod.rs`) to compare rendered output to the fixture output (with deterministic normalization for newlines/trailing whitespace; diffs on failure).

Acceptance:
- No `"[needs Go capture]"` or `needs_runtime` left in `tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/glow.json`.
- Glow reader fixtures assert equality (after normalization).
- `cargo run -p charmed_conformance --bin run-conformance -- --crate glow --verbose` passes with 0 skipped.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"RusticDeer","created_at":"2026-02-10T04:46:16.042358829Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T05:11:08.859404796Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T05:11:08.859337581Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","glow"]}
 {"id":"bd-32ba","title":"SSH mode: run the showcase UI per SSH session","description":"For each SSH session, run the bubbletea program with the session stdin/stdout.

Implementation:
- use bubbletea custom I/O (`with_input`, `with_output`) so the runtime doesn’t touch local terminal state.
- ensure window size propagation from SSH PTY.

Acceptance:
- The same UI (or a curated subset) is usable over SSH.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:13:51.571123791Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T01:34:09.974981690Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T01:34:09.974913663Z","close_reason":"Verified complete: ssh.rs implements wish::tea::middleware that creates App instances per SSH session. Uses bubbletea custom I/O via session streams. PTY window size propagation handled by wish framework. Tests included in ssh.rs.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bubbletea","demo_showcase","wish"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-32ba","depends_on_id":"bd-13np","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-32ba","depends_on_id":"bd-3chy","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-32ba","depends_on_id":"bd-3xs0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-32ba","depends_on_id":"bd-ab35","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-32pp","title":"Logs: styled log formatting using charmed_log","description":"Implement the *styled* log formatting layer for the Logs page using `charmed_log`.

Why:
- A flagship ops-style demo lives and dies by log readability.
- This showcases that `charmed_log` + lipgloss styling can produce beautiful, information-dense output.

Formatting requirements:
- Each log entry should include (where available):
  - timestamp (compact)
  - level (TRACE/DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR)
  - service/component name
  - message
- Styling:
  - color-coded levels (warn/error pop, info muted)
  - consistent column alignment and truncation
  - preserve legibility in narrow terminals
- No-color mode:
  - degrade gracefully (no ANSI), still aligned and readable

Integration:
- Logs are produced by the demo domain simulation and by user actions.
- The formatted line should carry the structured fields needed for filtering (level/service/query) without re-parsing the rendered string.

Acceptance:
- Logs look great, are readable at a glance, and remain usable with thousands of lines.
- Deterministic formatting (important for snapshot/E2E artifacts).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:11:37.574456901Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T02:43:16.801798652Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T02:43:16.801717932Z","close_reason":"Implemented LogFormatter with styled, aligned output supporting color-coded levels, no-color mode, and configurable column widths. Added 8 tests.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["charmed_log","demo_showcase","logs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-32pp","depends_on_id":"bd-2qx1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-32pp","depends_on_id":"bd-33fe","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-32pp","depends_on_id":"bd-3mh2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-33fe","title":"demo_showcase data: structured log stream + formatting","description":"Create the underlying structured log stream used by the demo (domain simulation + user actions).

Why:
- The Logs page should not be "just strings". We want structured fields so filtering/search is fast and correct.
- It proves the integration story: domain layer emits events, UI renders + filters them.

Deliverables:
- A `LogEntry` type (or similar) with fields like:
  - timestamp / monotonic tick
  - level
  - service/component
  - message
  - optional correlation ids (job id, deployment id)
- A log buffer/stream:
  - append-only collection with a bounded retention policy (optional)
  - API to push new entries from simulation/actions

Integration:
- The Logs viewer uses this stream and a formatter (`Logs: styled log formatting using charmed_log`) to render.
- Filtering operates on structured fields, not re-parsed rendered text.

Acceptance:
- Large log volumes remain responsive.
- Entries support correlation (wizard → job → logs) and filtering by level/service.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:08:53.990998123Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T02:32:29.336843390Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T02:32:29.336748333Z","close_reason":"Implemented structured log stream with filtering. Enhanced LogEntry with tick, job_id, deployment_id correlation. Created LogStream with filtering by level/target/job/deployment/text/tick-range, count_by_level(), and bounded retention. Added 16 new tests.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["charmed_log","data","demo_showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-33fe","depends_on_id":"bd-278q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-33fe","depends_on_id":"bd-2hwq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
